TotalBorrow().notice: Get the total amount of borrow*

TotalPledge().notice: Get the total amount of pledge*

TotalSupply().notice: Get the total amount of supply*

borrowBalanceOf(address).notice: Get the total amount of borrow*

changeBeneficiary().notice: Call the miner's change beneficiary method

changePledgeScale(address,uint32).notice: change pledge miner  scale to the contract,This operation will  affect the miner's loanable balance and the entire user's loanable balance

getAvailableBalance().notice: Get the current miner available balance

getAvailableBalance(string).notice: Get the current miner available balance

pledgeBalanceOf(address).notice: Get the total amount of pledge*

setBaseBorrowInterestRate(uint256).notice: set the base borrow interest rate*

setBaseSupplyInterestRate(uint256).notice: set the base supply interest rate*

supply(uint256).notice: Deposit funds into the contract to provide liquidity and obtain income.

supplyBalanceOf(address).notice: Get the total amount of supply*

totalBorrowInterestOf(address).notice: Get the total amount of borrow interest*

totalSupplyInterestOf(address).notice: Get the total amount of supply interest*

unClaimBorrowInterestOf(address).notice: Get the rePay amount of borrow interest*

unClaimSupplyInterestOf(address).notice: Get the  unClaim amount of supply interest*

withdraw(uint256).notice: Transfer tokens out of the market
